get.summary: List company memberships for current user
List members of the active company

post.summary: Invite existing user to active company
Get ARES registration data (+ optional VAT status)

get.summary: Get the active company ISDS (datové schránky) settings
List companies the user belongs to
Find user companies by name (partial, diacritic-insensitive)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by invoice type - RECEIVED or ISSUED

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Free-text search across invoice number and counterparty company name (case-insensitive, partial match)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by invoice status. OVERDUE matches ISSUED invoices past their due date.

parameters.name: createdDateFrom
parameters.description: Filter by issue date (createdDate) - range start, inclusive

parameters.name: createdDateTo
parameters.description: Filter by issue date (createdDate) - range end, inclusive

get.summary: List invoices by company with filtering and pagination
Get count of invoices for the active company in current year

post.summary: Parse receipt image into structured data

get.summary: Export VAT return and control statement XML
List invoices contributing to the VAT return for a given month

post.summary: Test the ISDS (datové schránky) connection by logging in via SOAP. Pass username + password to verify credentials before saving them; send an empty body to test the company's saved credentials.
Send a data message with XML attachments via ISDS

get.summary: List data messages recorded for the current company

parameters.name: taxFilingId
parameters.description: ID of the tax filing to submit

post.summary: Submit a tax filing (DPH + KH XML) to the financial office via ISDS

get.summary: Get the ISDS delivery status of a recorded data message
Get a single recorded data message by id (no ISDS refresh)

count.description: Number of invoices (statuses ISSUED and PAID)

totalWithTax.description: Sum of totalWithTax across counted invoices

unpaidTotalWithTax.description: Sum of totalWithTax across unpaid invoices

overdueCount.description: Number of unpaid invoices past their due date

getDphStatus.description: When true, each result is enriched with its CRPDPH VAT status and — for sole traders (právní forma 101) — the RZP proprietor name, as in getRegistrationData.

publishedAt.description: Date the account was published (ISO date).

standard.description: True for a standard domestic account, false for non-standard.

formatted.description: Human-readable account, e.g. "19-2000145399/0800" or the IBAN.

found.description: False when the DIČ is not registered as a VAT payer.

unreliable.description: True if flagged unreliable (nespolehlivý plátce), false if reliable, null when not found.

unreliableSince.description: Date the payer was flagged unreliable (ISO date), if any.

taxOfficeCode.description: Financial office code (číslo FÚ) the payer belongs to.

generatedAt.description: When the registry generated the answer.

username.description: ISDS login username, or null when not configured

hasPassword.description: Whether an ISDS password is stored

bankId.description: UUID of a managed Bank row. Provide this OR `bankSnapshot`, not both. Required for ISSUED invoices.

bankSnapshot.description: Direct bank-account snapshot, e.g. for RECEIVED invoices where the supplier account is captured ad-hoc instead of as a managed Bank row. Mutually exclusive with `bankId`.

contact.description: Ad-hoc counterparty details for kind=SIMPLE when no contactId is used. Mutually exclusive with contactId. Requires at least `name`.

number.description: Required for kind=INVOICE, optional for kind=SIMPLE.

type.description: Required for kind=INVOICE. Defaults to RECEIVED for kind=SIMPLE.

status.description: Invoice status. Defaults to ISSUED when omitted.

paidDate.description: Date the invoice was already paid. When set, the invoice is created with status PAID and a full-amount payment with this date is recorded.

paidPaymentMethod.description: Payment method of the recorded payment when paidDate is set. Defaults to BANK_TRANSFER.

items.description: Required for kind=INVOICE. Totals are computed server-side.

total.description: Required for kind=SIMPLE. Pre-computed base total.

totalTax.description: Required for kind=SIMPLE. Pre-computed VAT amount.

totalWithTax.description: Required for kind=SIMPLE. Pre-computed total with VAT.

note.description: Public note shown on the invoice.

internalNote.description: Internal note, not shown to the counterparty.

originalNumber.description: Supplier-provided invoice number (typically used on RECEIVED invoices to keep the supplier's original reference).

vatClaimRatio.description: Required when vatClaimType=PARTIAL. Must be in (0,1]. Forced to 1 when vatClaimType=FULL.

vatClaimMonth.description: First day of the month in which VAT is claimed (YYYY-MM-01).

originalValue.description: Original field value before the change

newValue.description: New field value after the change

number.description: Always present for kind=INVOICE, optional for kind=SIMPLE.

bankSnapshot.description: Direct bank-account snapshot (mutually exclusive with `bankId`). Setting this clears `bankId`.

contact.description: Ad-hoc counterparty details for kind=SIMPLE invoices not linked to a Contact. Mutually exclusive with contactId. Cannot be used on an invoice that already has a contactId. Requires at least `name`.

number.description: Document number. Send null to clear it on kind=SIMPLE; cannot be cleared on kind=INVOICE.

items.description: Array of invoice items. Totals are recomputed server-side when provided.

vatClaimRatio.description: Required when vatClaimType=PARTIAL. Must be in (0,1]. Forced to 1 when vatClaimType=FULL.

vatClaimMonth.description: First day of the month in which VAT is claimed (YYYY-MM-01).

vatClaimStatus.description: CLAIMED is reserved for the future tax-filing workflow and cannot be set via API.

bankId.description: UUID of the bank to set as default
UUID of the company bank account the payment went through
UUID of the company bank account the payment went through

base.description: Taxable base amount at this rate

dic.description: Vendor's tax identification number / VAT ID (DIČ)

description.description: LLM-generated short label usable as the invoice description (e.g. "Restaurace - U Fleku", "Alza - notebook")

documentNumber.description: Invoice / receipt / document number as printed

vat.description: Total VAT amount (sum of all rates)

vatBreakdown.description: Per-rate VAT breakdown; null when no rate breakdown is present on the document

username.description: ISDS username to test. Provide together with `password` to verify credentials before they are saved on the company; omit both to test the company's already-saved credentials.

password.description: ISDS password to test. Must be provided together with `username`.

dbType.description: Data box type (e.g. PFO, PO, OVM)

name.description: Owner display name (company name or person full name)

success.description: Whether ISDS accepted the configured credentials

owner.description: Owner of the data box that was logged into

filename.description: Attachment file name (becomes the ISDS dmFileDescr)

content.description: Raw XML content of the attachment

mimeType.description: MIME type of the attachment (defaults to text/xml)

recipientId.description: Recipient data box ID (dbIDRecipient — exactly 7 characters)

attachments.description: XML files to attach — at least one; the first becomes "main"

success.description: Whether ISDS accepted and created the message

messageId.description: ISDS message ID (dmID) — null when the send failed
ISDS message ID (dmID) — null when the send failed

taxFilingId.description: Tax filing this message submitted, if any

statusMessage.description: ISDS dmStatusMessage — the failure reason when failed

events.description: Persisted ISDS delivery event timeline (last refresh)

success.description: Whether ISDS accepted and created the message

messageId.description: ISDS message ID (dmID) — null when the send failed

taxFilingId.description: ID of the submitted tax filing

taxFilingStatus.description: Tax filing status after the call — SUBMITTED on success, unchanged otherwise

messageId.description: ISDS message ID (dmID) — null when the send failed

statusMessage.description: ISDS dmStatusMessage — the failure reason when failed

deliveredAt.description: When the message was legally served (doručeno) — ISDS dmAcceptanceTime (by login or fiction) (ISO 8601)

servedAt.description: When the message reached the data box (dodáno) — ISDS dmDeliveryTime (ISO 8601)
